events.title: Prometheus Day 2026 (via Cloud Native Events)
events.justification: A highly specialized developer day completely dedicated to Prometheus, systems monitoring, alerting, metrics collection, and overall observability, which is a major component of the profile.

events.title: Google I/O Connect Europe (via Google Developers Europe)
events.justification: European flagship developer conference showcasing Google Cloud solutions, Gemini APIs, and Go developer integrations, holding extreme relevance to the profile's multi-cloud and Go requirements.

events.title: AWS Summit Paris (via AWS Events Europe)
events.justification: Critical European cloud native summit focusing on AWS cloud architecture, container deployments (EKS), and infrastructure as code, directly serving the cloud infrastructure requirements.

events.title: Red Hat Summit Connect Madrid (via Red Hat Events)
events.justification: Major Red Hat enterprise open source summit in Southern Europe focusing on hybrid cloud and AI infrastructure.

events.title: Codemotion Milan 2026 (via Italy Developer Events)
events.justification: Italy's biggest gathering for software developers. Features extensive tracks on backend architecture (Go/Python), AI engineering, and DevOps practices.

events.title: KubeCon Europe 2026 (via Dutch Tech Events)
events.justification: The ultimate flagship event for cloud native computing and Kubernetes in the Netherlands, directly matching the highest priority skillsets.

events.title: WebExpo 2026 (via Czech Tech Events)
events.justification: Central Europe's premier event for tech leaders and backend developers, fostering cross-disciplinary discussions around AI and systems design.

events.title: GOTO Copenhagen 2026 (via Nordic Tech Events)
events.justification: Top-tier enterprise software development conference in the Nordics with notoriously strong tracks on distributed systems, Go, and observability.

events.title: Swiss Python Summit 2026 (via Swiss Tech Events)
events.justification: A community-focused conference in Switzerland perfectly targeting the Python developer profile, highlighting ML engineering and advanced data pipelines.

events.title: InfoShare 2026 (via Poland Tech Events)
events.justification: The biggest tech and startup conference in CEE (Poland), heavily showcasing advanced backend scalable systems and AI engineering.

events.title: Shift Conference 2026 (via Croatia Tech Events)
events.justification: A premier developer conference in Croatia gathering attendees globally for high-level technical discussions on cloud infrastructure and API development.

events.title: Web Summit 2026 (via Portugal Tech Events)
events.justification: One of the largest global tech conferences hosted in Portugal, offering high-value networking and deep dives into cloud infrastructure and AI startups.
